description: A graphic styled like a film poster with a beige and smoke-gray background and large gold title text reading 'CICERO'. Credit lines across the top read 'DIRECTOR TODD LYONS', 'SECRETARY KRISTI NOEM', 'PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP' and 'CHIEF GREGORY BOVINO'. Stylized portraits of four people are arranged below, including officials in suits and tactical gear, with an American flag and tactical figures in the background.
notable_text: CICERO; DIRECTOR TODD LYONS; SECRETARY KRISTI NOEM; PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP; CHIEF GREGORY BOVINO
